sentences.text: How's it going, Lester?
Hey, doing good, how about yourself?
I'm doing well, doing well, I'm, Trying to recover from the long weekend, but hopefully we have a short week.
I hear you.
What about you?
Did you have a good Labor Day?
Yeah, yeah, it was quiet, suspended at home, so that was good.
Yeah, this is 1050.
Nice, are you a big football fan?
I'm more of a soccer fan.
Okay, fair.
What's your team?
So the Spanish League, one of the ones, Real Madrid.
Okay.
Nice.
I, you know, I'd be lying if I said that I followed soccer like I do football or… or basketball, but… I'm a fan of soccer.
I just would prefer to be there in person.
In college, I played baseball and basketball, but I had a work study where I was, like.
the… not the ball boy, but you know how soccer has, like, the people standing around that tosses a ball so the game can continue a lot faster than if it goes in the stands?
I was one of those, so, like, I just got to watch soccer, like, for all four years that I was there, and that's when I started to like it a lot.
You're muted if you're talking.
Oh, I'm back.
There you go.
You're good.
Nice.
Yeah.

But yeah, I, one of my, my roommates in college, he studied abroad in Rome, and he went to a game there, and he just said, like, the environment in a different country watching soccer is night and day difference from what you see in America watching it.
Oh, no, no, yeah, especially Europe.
Europe is… that's the main thing, so yeah, I can see it.
I'd love to go there and experience it once, like, in person, like, in a stadium.
Their stadiums are huge.
Oh, yeah, yeah, yeah.
So… well, cool, Lester.
I know you're super busy, man, so I won't keep you long.
Thank you for hopping on.
I know Lily introduced us because you're using our Maven product right now, but you had interest in our ILS and everything it offered too?
Yes, yes, you know, anything that gets us more exposure.
Okay.
Perfect, and… Correct me if I'm wrong, you have 12 properties, right?
Correct, yes.
Okay.
What do you do for the advertising on that them right now?
So right now is, apartments.
com, apartment list, Of course, the Mabrin product,
we cut down on Zillow, so, it's pretty much that, Facebook,
The biggest thing right now really is, Resident referrals.
That has always been a big thing.
Oh, yeah.
Okay, so referrals is a big aspect.
How has renter traffic and renter demand been lately?
Lately it's been completely crap, so…
Okay.
The properties are usually between 93-94% occupied, and right now they're trending, like, high 80s?
Okay.
So, it's gone down, significantly.
Yeah, yeah, no, I definitely understand that.
There's a couple of places I feel like we can help fill in the gaps and boost that renter traffic and demand and occupancy, for sure.
I'll kind of dive in and show you what we offer and how we can do that, if you're ready for it.
Yeah, go ahead.
Okay.
Let me see here, I'll share my screen, too.
Can you see this okay?
Yep, I see it.
Perfect.

So, you currently use the Maven product, which helps with Google exposure, driving organic traffic that way, and ultimately saving you time from having to update everything yourself and keep that ac- the Google pages active.
with… with our ILS side, its main focus is driving renter traffic and filling vacancies.
So, the way it works is it integrates with ResMond, just like the Maven product does.
When we pull in your property information, we first and foremost list it on our rentable ILS, which is very similar to, like, your Apartments.
com or your apartment list.
Where we differ is a couple of big things.

One is our syndicate network, so we have a massive amount of exposure that we're able to create, through our syndicate partnerships, and then the other is how cost-effective it is, because it's pennies to the dollar compared to an Apartments.
com cost.
Appreciate it now.
When it comes to our syndicate network, our syndicate network includes essentially everywhere except for Apartments.
com.
And then we… use an AI tool to kind of make sure we're not duplicating listings.
So, like, in your case, you're using an apartment list.
This AI tool will make sure that we're not pushing and duplicating to any of the… to that site for any of your properties.

But, like, in the case where you have Zillow on a couple of properties, but not all of them, we won't duplicate for those couple that are utilizing it, but for all the ones that aren't, we can fill in the gaps and still get you up there.
Okay, appreciate it.
Got it.
And then…
Yeah, so essentially just getting your property more exposure, getting you on all the sites that you're not already on.
But the other big key piece here is we have an all-inclusive targeted social ad piece, where we're reaching out to renters for you on Facebook and Instagram versus waiting for them to come to you.
And… Oh, wow.
Yeah, so it's been a highly effective piece.

The way it works is it'll kind of go hand-in-hand, almost, with your Maven, product, because, like, anytime somebody's going on Google and saying, show me apartments in… Farmers Branch, Texas, or wherever, right?
The next time they get on their Facebook or Instagram, within about 30 to 45 seconds of scrolling, we'll hit them with a targeted rentable ad.
And it'll have pictures of your individual property.
It'll have some details about it, like the lowest advertised price, if there's a pool, if it's pet-friendly, things to kind of help stand out and attract a renter.
And then where our ads differ from a lot of other companies.
is a lot of other companies typically do one of two things.

On their social ads, they'll redirect them to their personal site, and then you can see all the properties that they're advertising for, or they'll redirect them to a property website, which is great, but at the end of the day, you don't know if that person became a lead, you lose visibility, and you don't know what happened.
With all of our targeted social ads, they're lead generating.

So, once somebody clicks learn more with us, it's going to capture and have them fill out a form with their name, their email, their phone number, and we're going to deliver that as a guest card into your resin.
Okay.
Or to an on-site leasing email, or both, whichever you really prefer.
And that's how all of our leads would come in.
All of our leads would come in as a rentable guest card, and then we can send them wherever you'd prefer.
Okay, cool.
So, I'll pause there for a second, because I know I've said a lot.
What questions do you have?
No, really none.
It sounds good.
We, we lost the integration with, Facebook a couple of months ago, so…
Yeah.
we used to be integrated with NOC.
Okay.
essentially not was integrated with Resman, rather.
So, I believe at the end of the year, last year, they cut that integration, so… There's nobody or nothing that can push those messages, to… to the on-site team anymore.
Yeah, to… oh, so are you still using NOC right now?
Yes.
Okay, so we integrate with NOC, so we can push all of your leads that we send in to NOC.
And then you're talking about the Facebook feed as well.
Back in 2023, yeah, they changed their policy to where companies couldn't have a direct feed in the marketplace.
However, we still have the feed into, like, social ad components.
So, we have, like, a workaround for it that's been, honestly, way more effective than the Facebook Marketplace feed that we used to utilize.
Oh, perfect.
Yeah, that works.
Now, we are kind of moving away from NOG.
We,
we turned on the integration today with Elise AI.
I'm not sure if you… you guys are integrated with Elise.
We are, so we integrate with both.
So, like, for the properties that have NOC, we can still send it to NOC, but if the ones that have a lease AI, we can send it to a lease AI.
Perfect.
And then once you… I'm assuming if you're moving away from NOC, you're doing a… you're working on a full rollout to Elise AI, we can switch everything over and have them all sent to Elise AI, so…
Perfect.
Alright.
That's not hard at all.
But yeah.
I guess, in terms of doing this, is this something that you would be looking to do more so portfolio-wide?
Yes, I think so.
We were just talking about it, I want to say last week.
Okay.
Since we were working on budgets, and we were thinking about cutting apartments.
com, but eventually we came to an agreement, so… Anything that would add more exposure, it's always something that we… You know, we will look into.
For sure.
Well, I'll tell you the pricing then.
You'll see the… when I say the pricing, you're gonna be like, holy smokes, that's compared to Apartments.
com spend.
Only $199 a month per property.
Okay.
So, and that gets you everything we talked about, rentable ILS, the partnership network, paid social ads, access to our backend dashboard.
Lily will still be your success manager, just like she is now for the Maven product, so you won't have to learn a new face or anything like that.
Perfect.
Okay.
Yeah, that, I mean, that, that works, so…
I mean, yeah, that's good.

So I did have… Well, I didn't have a question, but I did mention to, to the decision maker that I would… I was gonna have, you know, the meeting today, and, I was gonna have some numbers for… for him, hopefully by tomorrow.
Okay.
So… I'll run it by him, see what he thinks, and yeah, yeah, I can let you know.
But it sounds really good.
Awesome.

Well, I'm glad to hear that, and what I can do for you to make it easier too, Lester, is I can send you a follow-up email with some of the bullet points we talked about and the pricing, just so you have it to… to kind of throw over to them.
Yeah, that works.
Sweet.
Sweet.
So, in terms of a follow-up, if you plan on meeting with him tomorrow, when would you like to follow up with one another?
Do you want to do it, like, Thursday or Friday?
Thursday sounds good, yes.
Okay.
I will make a note here, and, once you show things to him, and if he likes it, I, you know, I look forward to potentially working together.
Sounds good, yeah, for sure.
Awesome, man.
Well, thank you.
Do you have any other questions for me?
No, no, that was pretty much it.
Okay, perfect.
Well, I will get to work in sending that email over to you, and I'll talk to, talk to you Thursday.
Sounds good, Nathan.
Take care.
Awesome.
Thank you, Lester.
Have a good one.
You bet.
